# Sub-Zero Repair Company (Fivestar Appliance Repair Pros)

> Sub-Zero Repair Company, operating as Fivestar Appliance Repair Pros, is a licensed and insured appliance repair business headquartered in Coral Gables, Florida. Founded in 1994, the company specializes in Sub-Zero refrigerator, freezer, ice maker, wine cooler, and marine refrigeration repair across 7 counties and 82 cities in South Florida. All technicians are factory-trained with over 30 years of combined experience. Service is available 24/7, 365 days a year, with same-day appointments and no extra charges for weekends or holidays. Only genuine manufacturer parts are used, and all repairs include a full warranty on parts and labor.

## Key Facts

- Legal Name: Sub-Zero Repair Company
- DBA: Fivestar Appliance Repair Pros
- Phone: (800) 651-4528
- Address: 1600 Ponce De Leon Blvd 10th Floor Suite 64, Coral Gables, FL 33134
- Email: info@fivestarappliancerepairpros.com
- Website: https://fivestarappliancerepairpros.com
- Founded: 1994
- Hours: 24/7, 365 days a year
- Experience: 30+ years combined
- Licensed and insured in the state of Florida
- Payment: Cash, credit card, debit card, check
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Services

- Sub-Zero Refrigerator Repair (all models: built-in, undercounter, integrated)
- Sub-Zero Freezer Repair (columns, integrated, freestanding)
- Sub-Zero Ice Maker Repair (built-in and standalone units)
- Sub-Zero Wine Cooler Repair (temperature and humidity calibration)
- Sub-Zero Marine Refrigeration Repair (dockside service at South Florida marinas)

## Brands Serviced

- Sub-Zero (primary specialty)
- Bosch
- Viking
- Thermador
- Miele

## Service Area

- Miami-Dade County (21 cities including Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Key Biscayne, Pinecrest)
- Broward County (22 cities including Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pompano Beach)
- Palm Beach County (17 cities including Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, Jupiter)
- Monroe County (5 cities including Key Largo, Islamorada)
- Collier County (9 cities including Naples, Marco Island)
- Martin County (4 cities including Stuart, Palm City)
- St. Lucie County (4 cities including Port St. Lucie, Fort Pierce)

## Differentiators

- Same-day service available on all repairs
- No extra charges for nights, weekends, or holidays
- Factory-trained and certified technicians
- Genuine manufacturer parts used exclusively
- Full warranty on all parts and labor
- Transparent pricing with written estimates before work begins
- Both residential and commercial service
- Emergency 24/7 response, typically within hours

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Q: What areas do you service?
A: We provide Sub-Zero appliance repair services throughout South Florida, including Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County, Monroe County, Collier County, Martin County, and St. Lucie County.

### Q: Do you offer same-day service?
A: Yes! We offer same-day service for most repairs. Call us at (800) 651-4528 and we'll dispatch a certified technician to your location as quickly as possible.

### Q: What brands do you repair?
A: We specialize in Sub-Zero appliance repair but also service Bosch, Viking, Thermador, and Miele appliances throughout South Florida.

### Q: Do you use genuine parts?
A: Yes, we exclusively use genuine manufacturer parts for all repairs. This ensures optimal performance and maintains your appliance's warranty.

### Q: Are your technicians certified?
A: All of our technicians are factory-trained and certified with over 30 years of combined experience repairing Sub-Zero and other premium appliances.

### Q: Do you charge extra for weekends or holidays?
A: No! We do not charge any extra fees for weekend or holiday service calls. Our rates are the same 24/7, 365 days a year.

### Q: Do you provide a warranty on repairs?
A: Yes, we provide a full warranty on all parts and labor for every repair we perform.

### Q: How much does a typical repair cost?
A: Repair costs vary depending on the issue and parts needed. We provide transparent pricing with written estimates before beginning any work, so there are no surprises.

### Q: Can you repair built-in Sub-Zero units?
A: Absolutely. Our technicians are experienced in repairing all Sub-Zero models, including built-in refrigerators, freezers, wine coolers, and undercounter units.

### Q: Do you offer maintenance services?
A: Yes, we offer preventive maintenance services to keep your Sub-Zero appliances running efficiently. Regular maintenance can help prevent costly breakdowns.

### Q: How do I schedule a service call?
A: You can schedule a service call by calling us at (800) 651-4528 or by filling out our online contact form. We'll confirm your appointment and dispatch a technician promptly.

### Q: What should I do if my refrigerator stops cooling?
A: First, check that the unit is plugged in and the thermostat is set correctly. If the issue persists, call us immediately at (800) 651-4528 for emergency repair service.

### Q: Do you service commercial equipment?
A: Yes, we service both residential and commercial Sub-Zero refrigeration equipment throughout South Florida.

### Q: Can you repair Sub-Zero marine refrigeration?
A: Yes, we specialize in Sub-Zero marine refrigeration repair and provide dockside service at marinas throughout South Florida.

### Q: Do you offer any discounts or promotions?
A: Yes! We currently offer 15% off any appliance repair, free maintenance with repairs over $250, and other special promotions. Call us for current offers.

### Q: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
A: We offer 24/7 emergency response and can typically have a technician at your location within a few hours of your call.

### Q: What is your service area for marine refrigeration?
A: We provide marine refrigeration repair at marinas and ports throughout South Florida, from the Florida Keys to Palm Beach County.

### Q: Do I need to be home during the repair?
A: Yes, we recommend that an adult be present during the repair so our technician can discuss the diagnosis and get approval before proceeding with any work.

### Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, checks, and cash for payment of services.

### Q: How long does a typical repair take?
A: Most repairs are completed within 1-2 hours. If additional parts are needed, we'll schedule a follow-up visit as quickly as possible.

### Q: Can you repair a Sub-Zero that is leaking water?
A: Yes, water leaks are one of the most common issues we repair. Our technicians can quickly diagnose the source of the leak and fix it the same day.

### Q: Do you offer free estimates?
A: We provide written estimates before beginning any work. Our service call fee is applied to the cost of repair if you choose to proceed.

### Q: What if you can't fix my appliance?
A: If we determine that your appliance cannot be repaired cost-effectively, we'll provide honest advice about your options and you won't be charged for the repair.

### Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes, we are fully licensed and insured to perform appliance repair services throughout the state of Florida.

### Q: Why should I choose your company over others?
A: We offer 24/7 availability, same-day service, certified technicians with 30+ years of experience, genuine parts, transparent pricing, no extra charges for weekends or holidays, and a full warranty on all parts and labor.

## Detailed Service Descriptions

### Sub-Zero Refrigerator Repair in South Florida

You have no time to lose if your fridge or freezer is failing. Depend on our Sub-Zero Service Centers for emergency Sub-Zero refrigerator service and repair in South Florida. We'll save your food by repairing your refrigerator unit. The trained technicians at our company ensure your commercial or residential equipment is fully operational. That means your food stays fresh and you save money by keeping it that way.

Customers throughout the area trust us for emergency response when they have problems with their refrigeration equipment. Because our technicians are experienced and factory-trained, we deliver the highest-quality services to ensure your Sub-Zero equipment is fully operational as soon as possible.

If your refrigerator breaks, you need immediate emergency services. At our company, we have extensive experience in repairing all types of Sub-Zero units. In addition, we keep a large supply of authentic Sub-Zero refrigerator parts on our trucks. This ensures that we are able to fix everything -- from freestanding units to built-in models. You can depend on us for same-day repair, affordable services, and high-quality workmanship.

### Sub-Zero Freezer Repair in South Florida

When your Sub-Zero freezer stops working properly, you need fast, professional help. Our certified technicians specialize in diagnosing and repairing all Sub-Zero freezer models, from built-in units to freestanding models.

We understand the urgency of a freezer breakdown. That's why we offer same-day service and carry genuine Sub-Zero parts on every service call. Our technicians will quickly diagnose the issue and provide a transparent estimate before beginning any work.

Common freezer issues we repair include temperature inconsistencies, ice buildup, unusual noises, door seal problems, and compressor failures. No matter the issue, our factory-trained technicians have the expertise to get your freezer running properly again.

### Sub-Zero Ice Maker Repair in South Florida

Is your Sub-Zero ice maker not producing ice or making unusual noises? Our expert technicians specialize in all types of Sub-Zero ice maker repairs. We handle everything from clogged water lines to faulty motors and sensors.

We carry genuine Sub-Zero replacement parts on every service call, ensuring your ice maker is repaired with the highest quality components. Our same-day service means you won't be without ice for long.

Whether your ice maker is built into your refrigerator or a standalone unit, our factory-trained technicians have the knowledge and experience to diagnose and repair any issue quickly and efficiently.

### Sub-Zero Wine Cooler Repair in South Florida

Your wine collection deserves the best care. When your Sub-Zero wine cooler isn't maintaining the right temperature, our certified technicians can quickly diagnose and fix the issue to protect your valuable wines.

We specialize in all Sub-Zero wine cooler models, including built-in and freestanding units. Common issues we address include temperature fluctuations, compressor problems, humidity control, and door seal replacements.

Our technicians carry genuine Sub-Zero parts and have the factory training needed to service your wine cooler properly. We understand that proper temperature and humidity are critical for wine preservation, and we'll ensure your unit is performing optimally.

### Sub-Zero Marine Refrigeration Repair in South Florida

Keep your vessel's refrigeration running smoothly with our specialized marine repair services. Our technicians are experienced in servicing Sub-Zero marine refrigeration units on boats and yachts throughout South Florida.

Marine refrigeration systems face unique challenges including salt air exposure, vibration, and power fluctuations. Our factory-trained technicians understand these challenges and have the expertise to diagnose and repair any issue.

We provide dockside service throughout South Florida's marinas and ports. Whether you need emergency repair or scheduled maintenance, our team is ready to keep your marine refrigeration performing at its best.
